title: Integration Health Check Runbook
description: A runbook for monitoring API sync reliability across ERP, CRM, finance, and messaging integrations.
excerpt: Follow this process when daily integration jobs miss SLA or when dependent dashboards become stale.
author: Ezupp Platform Reliability Team

sections.text: Integration reliability depends on quick triage and predictable ownership. This runbook keeps response times consistent.

items: Failed job count by connector and region.
Payload validation failures grouped by source system.
Level 2: connector owner and business ops review.
Level 3: executive escalation for SLA breach above 4 hours.
